description: Verify build environment baseline. Confirm existing code compiles and tests pass before making any changes.
steps: Run 'make' in MK_OS/ and confirm mk_os binary builds successfully
Run 'make test' in MK_OS/ and confirm all 10 tests pass with 74 assertions
Note any warnings or issues to be aware of during implementation
acceptance_criteria: 'make test' passes all 10 tests and 74 assertions
findings: Build succeeds with 11 compiler warnings (unused parameters, unused private fields, unused lambda captures, field reorder in constructors). All warnings are in existing code. Tests: 10/10 pass, 74/74 assertions pass. Compiler: clang++ with C++17, flags: -O2 -Wall -Wextra -DDARWIN. Links against -lcurl -lsqlite3. Build produces mk_os binary; test produces mk_os_test binary.
